name: Entropy Production / Event Injection (S-Field)
equation: dS/dt = Sum_ij (|I_ij|^2/T_ij)*Re(1/G_tilde_ij) + kappa*Sum_ij|Delta w_ij| - gamma_S*(S - S_eq)
description: Entropy-like gating state: dissipative power term plus winding-discontinuity term inject S; relaxation returns S toward S_eq.
source: RDM3DC / PR Root Guide (Phase-Lift + Adaptive-π + ARP/AIN thread)
evidence: Couples physical dissipation to adaptation rates
Injects events when phase winding mismatches occur
